---
title: Analyzing Music Data
author: Gokul Patibandla
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---
```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}
billboard |>
  select(artist, track, date.entered, wk1:wk4)
```
```{r}
# Count how many wk6 values exist
billboard |>
  summarize(n_values = sum(!is.na(wk6)))

# Histogram of wk6 rankings
billboard |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wk6)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of wk6 Rankings",
    x = "wk6 Ranking",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
```{r}
billboard |>
  summarize(
    wk1_present  = sum(!is.na(wk1)),
    wk1_missing  = sum(is.na(wk1)),
    wk4_present  = sum(!is.na(wk4)),
    wk4_missing  = sum(is.na(wk4)),
    wk10_present = sum(!is.na(wk10)),
    wk10_missing = sum(is.na(wk10)),
    wk20_present = sum(!is.na(wk20)),
    wk20_missing = sum(is.na(wk20)),
    wk40_present = sum(!is.na(wk40)),
    wk40_missing = sum(is.na(wk40)),
    wk76_present = sum(!is.na(wk76)),
    wk76_missing = sum(is.na(wk76))
  )
```
```{r}
billboard |>
  mutate(
    ever_on_chart = rowSums(!is.na(across(starts_with("wk")))) > 0,
    ever_off_chart = rowSums(is.na(across(starts_with("wk")))) > 0
  ) |>
  mutate(
    reentered = ever_on_chart & ever_off_chart
  ) |>
  summarize(
    reentered_yes = sum(reentered),
    reentered_no  = sum(!reentered)
  )
```
```{r}
billboard |>
  mutate(
    change = wk6 - wk1,
    category = case_when(
      is.na(wk1) | is.na(wk6) ~ "missing",
      change < 0 ~ "improved",
      change == 0 ~ "same",
      change > 0 ~ "worse"
    )
  ) |>
  summarize(
    improved = sum(category == "improved"),
    same = sum(category == "same"),
    worse = sum(category == "worse"),
    missing = sum(category == "missing"),
    median_change = median(change, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
```{r}
billboard |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("wk"),
    names_to = "week",
    values_to = "rank",
    names_prefix = "wk",
    names_transform = list(week = as.integer)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(rank)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = rank, group = track)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Song Rankings Over Time",
    x = "Week on Chart",
    y = "Rank (1 = Best)"
  )
```
```{r}
# Reshape to long format
bill_long <- billboard |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("wk"),
    names_to = "week",
    values_to = "rank",
    names_prefix = "wk",
    names_transform = list(week = as.integer)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(rank))

# Song-level summary
song_summary <- bill_long |>
  group_by(artist, track) |>
  summarize(
    first_rank = first(rank),
    best_rank = min(rank),
    first_week_best = week[which.min(rank)],
    total_weeks = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Identify notable top-10 songs
top10_songs <- song_summary |>
  filter(best_rank <= 10)

fastest_to_number1 <- top10_songs |>
  filter(best_rank == 1) |>
  slice_min(first_week_best, n = 1)

slowest_to_number1 <- top10_songs |>
  filter(best_rank == 1) |>
  slice_max(first_week_best, n = 1)

longest_chart_run <- top10_songs |>
  slice_max(total_weeks, n = 1)

list(
  song_summary = song_summary,
  fastest_to_number1 = fastest_to_number1,
  slowest_to_number1 = slowest_to_number1,
  longest_chart_run = longest_chart_run
)
```
```{r}
#| cache: true

# Reshape to long format
bill_long <- billboard |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("wk"),
    names_to = "week",
    values_to = "rank",
    names_prefix = "wk",
    names_transform = list(week = as.integer)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(rank))

# Song-level summary
song_summary <- bill_long |>
  group_by(artist, track) |>
  summarize(
    first_rank = first(rank),
    best_rank = min(rank),
    first_week_best = week[which.min(rank)],
    total_weeks = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Top-10 songs
top10_songs <- song_summary |>
  filter(best_rank <= 10)

# Notable songs
fastest_to_number1 <- top10_songs |>
  filter(best_rank == 1) |>
  slice_min(first_week_best, n = 1) |>
  mutate(type = "Fastest to #1")

slowest_to_number1 <- top10_songs |>
  filter(best_rank == 1) |>
  slice_max(first_week_best, n = 1) |>
  mutate(type = "Slowest to #1")

longest_chart_run <- top10_songs |>
  slice_max(total_weeks, n = 1) |>
  mutate(type = "Longest Chart Run")

# Combine notable songs
notable <- bind_rows(
  fastest_to_number1,
  slowest_to_number1,
  longest_chart_run
)

# JOIN type column into long data
bill_long_with_type <- bill_long |>
  left_join(notable |> select(artist, track, type),
            by = c("artist", "track"))

# Plot
bill_long_with_type |>
  filter(track %in% top10_songs$track) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = rank, group = track)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(
    data = bill_long_with_type |> filter(!is.na(type)),
    aes(color = type),
    size = 1.2
  ) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(
    title = "Top-10 Songs: Ranking Over Time",
    x = "Week on Chart",
    y = "Rank (1 = Best)",
    color = "Notable Songs"
  )
```
